Title: xOrder — createOrderFromCart Happy Path
Preconditions: Runner-native. Full checkout → createOrderFromCart. Uses an isolated named cart (AGENT-TEST-ORDER-013) to avoid state leaks from other order-creation tests that run against the same default cart. CREATES A REAL ORDER — Admin cleanup required if needed.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=create_order] errors[] empty
[DATA label=create_order] data.createOrderFromCart.id is non-empty GUID
[DATA label=create_order] data.createOrderFromCart.number is non-null
[DATA label=create_order] data.createOrderFromCart.status is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] order.status should be New / Processing / Payment required on happy path — document actual value
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty; order.id null; status empty
Cleanup: Creates real order — cancel via Admin API if needed

Title: xOrder — createOrderFromCart Idempotency (Duplicate Call)
Preconditions: Runner-native. Full checkout + createOrderFromCart + second createOrderFromCart on same cartId. Expects second call to fail gracefully (not create duplicate order). CREATES A REAL ORDER.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=create_first] errors[] empty
[DATA label=create_first] data.createOrderFromCart.id is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] create_second: either (a) errors[] non-empty with cart-already-converted message OR (b) returns the same order id as create_first (idempotent). Either is acceptable (BL-ORD-005). No duplicate order with different id.
Failure_Signals: Two orders created with different ids (duplicate inventory decrement — P0); HTTP 500; silent success
Cleanup: Creates real order — Admin cleanup if needed

Title: xOrder — Second createOrderFromCart Returns Graceful Response
Preconditions: Runner-native. Covered pragmatically by GQL-024 — the second createOrderFromCart assertion. This case adds explicit graceful-error verification for the second attempt on a converted cart.
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] create_second: response is structured (either errors[] with cart-converted message OR same id). NO HTTP 500 or stack trace in errors[].message. No server crash.
Failure_Signals: HTTP 500; unhandled exception; stack trace in errors[]; duplicate order created

Title: xCart — Cart Invalidated After Order Creation
Preconditions: Runner-native. Create order, then attempt to addItem to the same (now converted) cartId → expect error or no-op (no items added).
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] add_after_convert: data.addItem.status should reflect converted/processed state OR errors[] non-empty. The cart must NOT accept new items. NO HTTP 500.
Failure_Signals: Converted cart silently accepts new addItem (P0 — duplicate inventory decrement after order); HTTP 500

Title: xOrder — createOrderFromCart with Empty Cart
Preconditions: Runner-native. Clears cart then attempts createOrderFromCart on empty cart. Expects errors[] non-empty with empty-cart message.
Steps:
[AUTH role=ORG_USER]
[GQL-OP setup_me]
  query { me { id } }
[GQL-EXEC setup_me]
[GQL-CAPTURE setup_me.data.me.id → USER_ID]
[GQL-OP pre_clear]
  mutation { clearCart(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC pre_clear]
[GQL-CAPTURE pre_clear.data.clearCart.id → CART_ID]
[GQL-OP create_empty]
  mutation { createOrderFromCart(command: { cartId: "{{CART_ID}}" }) { id number status } }
[GQL-EXEC create_empty]
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] create_empty: either errors[] non-empty with empty-cart/validation message OR data.createOrderFromCart is null. NO HTTP 500 or server crash. Order must NOT be created.
Failure_Signals: Order created with 0 items (P0: empty order); HTTP 500; stack trace in errors[].message

Title: xOrder — createOrderFromCart with Invalid cartId
Preconditions: Runner-native. Attempts createOrderFromCart with a zero-GUID cartId. Expects graceful error.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=create_bogus] errors[] non-empty — cart not found (BL-GQL-001)
[DATA label=create_bogus] data.createOrderFromCart is null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] Error messages don't leak stack traces or internal paths. Well-formed GraphQL error with message + path.
Failure_Signals: Order created for non-existent cart; HTTP 500; stack trace in errors[].message

Title: xOrder — createOrderFromCart Without Auth
Preconditions: Runner-native. No [AUTH] block — attempts createOrderFromCart anonymously. Expects Unauthorized.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=create_noauth] errors[] non-empty — Unauthorized (BL-GQL-004)
[DATA label=create_noauth] data.createOrderFromCart is null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] errors[].extensions.code = Unauthorized. No sensitive info in messages.
Failure_Signals: Order created without auth (P0 security); data non-null; HTTP 500
